text:
The most common bug to avoid in implementing run-length encoding is incorrectly handling the case when the input string is empty or contains only one character. 
```python
def rle_encode(s):
    if not s:
        return []
    result = []
    current_char = s[0]
    current_count = 1
    for char in s[1:]:
        if char == current_char:
            current_count += 1
        else:
            result.append((current_char, current_count))
            current_char = char
            current_count = 1
    result.append((current_char, current_count))
    return result
```
